result.stdout:
Description:
  CLI for querying Dockerfile content

Usage:
  dfspy [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  query  Queries for elements of a Dockerfile

result.stdout:
Description:
  Queries for elements of a Dockerfile

Usage:
  dfspy query [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  from  Queries for FROM instructions

commands.payload:
Description:
  Queries for elements of a Dockerfile

Usage:
  dfspy query [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  from  Queries for FROM instructions

result.stdout:
Description:
  Queries for FROM instructions

Usage:
  dfspy query from [options]

Options:
  -f, --dockerfile <dockerfile>  The path to the Dockerfile to query [default: Dockerfile]
  --resolve-vars                 Indicates that variables referenced in the queried values should be resolved
  --var <var>                    Override for variable referenced in the queried values (<var>=<value>)
  --layout <Flat|Graph>          The layout type of the results [default: Flat]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

  --layout <Flat|Graph>          The layout type of the results [default: Flat]
